docs.title: 2026-06-21 — Knowledge methodology designed, built, and integrated with CB
docs.description: Use when you need what happened in the session that created this standard and CB's OKF integration layer, without replaying it. Outcome: a conformance-tested OKF standard + a working CB↔OKF bridge.

docs.title: 2026-06-21 OKF/CB session - verbatim transcript
docs.description: Use when you need the raw, byte-for-byte record of the session that designed this standard and CB's OKF integration - the immutable Layer-1 source behind the thread summary.

docs.title: Meta — how this methodology was conceived and architected
docs.description: Use when you need the origin, rationale, or governing decisions behind this methodology — the foundational record of how the spec came to be shaped this way.

docs.title: How OKF, Karpathy-wiki, and CB layer
docs.description: Use when you need the worked argument for why CB sits cleanly above OKF and what becomes redundant — not just the conclusion.

docs.title: Knowledge is OKF on the floor, CB at the ceiling
docs.description: Use when tempted to make everything CB-rigorous, or to drop CB for plain OKF — the settled two-tier decision and what would change it.
